variants.title: Donaldson P550797 Lube Filter, Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550797 Lube Filter, Cartridge ensures clean engine oil by effectively trapping harmful contaminants, promoting extended oil life and maintaining optimal engine efficiency. Its high-performance filtration media helps protect critical components from premature wear and supports consistent engine operation. Built for durability and long service intervals, this cartridge lube filter is ideal for demanding conditions. It offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and ensures reliable lubrication, contributing to improved engine longevity and reduced maintenance.
specifications: Style: Lube Filter, Cartridge, Efficiency 1: 38µ @ β100, Outer Diameter: 70.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 31.0 mm, Length: 95.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 38µ @ β100

variants.title: Mann Filter HU 821 x Oil Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550797
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter HU 821 x Oil Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550797
variants.description: MANN-FILTER oil filters: Top filtration performance and optimal cleaning protect the engine against wear caused by impurities and combustion residues in the oil. Filter media and high-quality sealing materials that are individually tailored to the intended application offer optimum protection over the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Oil Filter, Dimension A: 72.0 mm, Dimension B: 31.0 mm, Dimension C: 31.0 mm, Dimension H: 95.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 38µ @ β100, Outer Diameter: 70.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 31.0 mm, Length: 95.0 mm
